# Hey Aaron! Marketing

> Web design, local SEO, ads, reviews, and follow-up for local service pros across East Texas — served à la carte. Free first year, then $250/mo. No contracts.

Hey Aaron! Marketing serves non-technical service professionals — plumbers, electricians, HVAC pros, roofers, handymen, landscapers, cleaners, contractors and more — across Livingston, Cleveland, Coldspring, Goodrich, Onalaska, Trinity, Willis, Splendora, Shepherd, Riverside, New Waverly, Panorama Village and the wider East Texas region.

Contact: +1-713-384-8985

## Plans (The Menu)
- [Plans & The Service-Pro Marketing Menu](https://aaron.chat/pricing/): House Special (first year free), $250/mo House Plate, Combo Plates, à la carte services, and Sides.
- [The Get-Found Plate](https://aaron.chat/plans/get-found-plate/): Rank Me Local™ + List Me Local™ + Local Group Sharing™ — $299/mo (save $78/mo ~20%). The foundational SEO bundle.
- [The Phone-Ringer Plate](https://aaron.chat/plans/phone-ringer-plate/): Facebook Ads™ + Adwords on Google™ + Lead Hustler™ — $399/mo (save $148/mo ~27%). Most Popular. Direct lead generation.
- [The Regulars Plate](https://aaron.chat/plans/regulars-plate/): Review Rocket™ + Stay In Touch — $299/mo (save $99/mo ~25%). Retention and referrals.

## Services (À La Carte)
- [Built For You Website™](https://aaron.chat/services/built-for-you-website/): Full web marketing engine — custom design, Cloudflare hosting, SEO, AI Engine Optimization, monthly blog posts, link building, citations, warm leads (Consent Resolve), product photos. $250/mo or one-time $2,500.
- [List Me Local™](https://aaron.chat/services/list-me-local/): Google Business Profile setup and ongoing optimization. $29/mo.
- [Local Group Sharing™](https://aaron.chat/services/local-group-sharing/): 2-3 fresh posts per week shared with 10-20 local Facebook groups, town pages, and community boards across your service area. Built for steady neighborhood reach without paid ads. $149/mo or $1,490/yr (2 months free).
- [Rank Me Local™](https://aaron.chat/services/rank-me-local/): Local SEO so your service business ranks for the jobs people search in your area. $199/mo.
- [Facebook Ads™](https://aaron.chat/services/facebook-ads/): Facebook and Instagram ad management for service pros. You set your monthly ad budget ($2,000-$50,000); we handle strategy, creative, targeting, daily optimization, lead delivery, and reporting. Flat 15% of media spend (from $300/mo to $7,500/mo).
- [Adwords on Google™](https://aaron.chat/services/adwords-on-google/): Google Ads management targeting high-intent local searches. $199/mo.
- [Lead Hustler™](https://aaron.chat/services/lead-hustler/): Fully-managed lead-platform service for service pros. Includes Zoho CRM setup and management, instant lead routing, daily platform optimization, lead-rejection credit recovery, and tracking-number-per-platform — for up to 3 platforms (Thumbtack, HomeAdvisor, Angi, Nextdoor, Yelp, Houzz, Service Direct, or others). $499/mo. Add'l platforms $99/mo each.
- [Verified Local™](https://aaron.chat/services/verified-local/): Google Local Services Ads — the "green-check" Guaranteed badge — set up and managed. $149/mo.
- [Review Rocket™](https://aaron.chat/services/review-rocket/): Get more 5-star reviews. Stay top of mind. Win more local business. Includes automated review requests (Google, Facebook, SMS, email), 100 postcards every month (design + printing + mailing + tracking), reputation monitoring with negative-review alerts, Google Business Profile growth, customer communication automation, referral boost campaigns, and a monthly performance dashboard. $299/mo. Additional postcards: $0.79-$0.59 each at 101-1,000+ volumes.
- [Stay In Touch](https://aaron.chat/services/stay-in-touch/): Email and SMS follow-ups that bring past customers back. $99/mo.
- [Call Tracking](https://aaron.chat/services/call-tracking/): Tracking number so you know which marketing made the phone ring. $19/mo.
